scenarios.name: B2B SaaS Google Ads launch at $5K/mo and $150 CPA
scenarios.rationale: Baseline runs a single broad search campaign on Target CPA from day one; treatment splits Brand + High-Intent + Competitor Conquest with the documented naming convention and manual CPC starting bids that switch to Target CPA after the ~50-conversion threshold plus tracking verification.

scenarios.name: Meta launch for meal-planning app at $3K/mo
scenarios.rationale: Baseline picks interests and makes generic ads with no lookalike LTV or scaling rules; treatment uses 1%-lookalike-on-premium + interest + broad, Hook-Problem-Solution-CTA video structure with captions, 2-week test then 20-30% scale every 3-5 days, plus install-no-subscribe retargeting and customer exclusions.
